ops.title: Semantic backend: keep semble; native Go/Rust-WASM path archived
ops.body:
Decision (2026-07-22, session-876fcee3 fix pass): ccx keeps semble as the semantic code-search backend. Research verdict: semble is MinishLab's (model2vec authors), MIT, ~155KB src, near-daily commits; already on the best code-tuned static embedding model (potion-code-16M-v2; CoIR: static 37.05 < BM25 42.31 < CodeRankEmbed-transformer 59.14 — why the BM25+RRF hybrid is mandatory). The observed docs-blindness was config, not architecture: semble's MCP entrypoint accepts --content, and ccx now passes `--content code docs`.

Archived for if semble stops fitting — a native backend is a realistic 1-2 week build:
- Embeddings: model2vec-rs ships an official `wasm` cargo feature targeting wasm32-unknown-unknown — the exact Rust->WASM->wazero pattern format-core already proves (scripts/build-wasm.sh, internal/format/engine.go). model2vec inference is tokenizer lookup + mean-pool; ~8k samples/sec single-threaded native Rust.
- Index: bleve v2.6+ has native vector fields + built-in RRF/RSF hybrid fusion (one Go dep for BM25+ANN+fusion); alternatives coder/hnsw (pure Go), usearch (cgo). ccx already hand-rolls BM25 in Go (internal/web/bm25.go).
- Chunking: cgo-free tree-sitter options exist (gotreesitter pure-Go runtime; malivvan/tree-sitter via wazero).
- Landscape (2026-07): no clean adoption target — flupkede/codesearch (Rust, Apache-2.0, closest fit) is 57-star single-maintainer with the same RRF-score opacity; LEANN (12.7k stars, MIT) is a Python subprocess with query-time embedding recompute; Zilliz claude-context requires Milvus; bloop archived.
- Quality ceiling: static models trail transformers ~22 CoIR points; any quality leap needs ONNX-class inference regardless of backend.

Pending follow-ups: (1) bump the semble pin when MinishLab releases >0.5.2 carrying partial reindexing (#225, merged 2026-07-21 — targets the observed 52s cold rebuild); (2) once the cosine-score PR (this pass) releases upstream, render absolute similarity + a weak-results annotation in internal/render/semble.go.
